name: EMnify
description: EMnify — Cloud-native cellular connectivity platform for IoT with programmable SIM management and REST API.

seo.title: EMnify — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: EMnify: EMnify — Cloud-native cellular connectivity platform for IoT with programmable SIM management and REST API.

when_to_use: Programmable global SIM management for IoT device fleets
REST API-controlled cellular connectivity for smart devices
Multi-operator LPWAN and LTE-M connections for field IoT
Real-time SIM activation and data policy management via API
Replacing carrier SIM contracts with flexible IoT connectivity

pros: Good REST API for SIM management
cons: Smaller than Soracom in some regions
review.verdict: A solid, developer-friendly IoT connectivity stack when APIs and global coverage matter most.
review.best_for: IoT products needing programmable, multi-carrier SIMs globally
review.not_for: Domestic-only fleets where a local MNO deal wins on price
